steps.title: Identify the country matching the 2020 data point
steps.content: The statement specifies a country that mined 0.55 million metric tons in 2020. Scanning the 2020 column in the table, Kazakhstan is the only country with this value.

steps.title: Look up that country's 1995 production
steps.content: Once Kazakhstan is identified, I check its 1995 row: 0.26 million metric tons. The other choices (0.59, 0.44, 2.49) don't correspond to Kazakhstan's 1995 production — they are 1995 figures for other countries in the table. The answer is C (0.26).
